title: poa novae-zelandiae
intro: Poa novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa novae-zelandiae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Poa novae-zelandiae can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
